  Thanks for contributing to Better-Moodle! 🎉

  Paragrahps starting with <!-- are comments and will not appear in the Pull-Request (PR).
-->

  Please choose a meaningfull title for your PR.
  If possible, this should be a commit message, following Coventional Commits.
-->

  If your PR is not ready yet, it is still okay to create it.
  Please open your PR as a draft-PR then.
  This allows reviewers to answer your questions while developing.
-->

## Description

<!--
  What does this PR do? Give a concise summary of the changes.
  What problem does it solve, or what improvement does it add?
-->

## Related Issue

<!--
  Does this PR fix or relate to an existing issue?
  Use "Closes #123" to automatically close the issue when this PR is merged.
  If there is no related issue, you can remove this section.
-->

Closes #

## Type of Change

<!--
  What type of change is this? Check all options that apply to your PR.
  This also helps to choose the correct Conventional Commits type for your commit messages.
-->

- [ ] 🐛 **fix** – Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **feat** – New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] ⚡ **perf** – Performance improvement
- [ ] ♻️ **refactor** – Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 📝 **docs** – Documentation only
- [ ] 🔧 **chore** – Build process, tooling, or dependency changes
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (existing functionality changes in a way that could break things)

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!--
  Describe how you tested your changes.
  Which browsers, operating systems and userscript managers did you use?
  Which Moodle instances were tested?
-->

|                        | Details                              |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| **Browser(s)**         | e.g. Firefox 135, Chrome 132         |
| **OS**                 | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15            |
| **Userscript Manager** | e.g. Tampermonkey 5.x, Violentmonkey |
| **Moodle Instance(s)** | e.g. UzL, CAU                        |

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings

<!--
  If your changes affect the UI, please add a screenshot or short screen recording.
  This makes visual review much faster. You can simply drag and drop images here.
  Remove this section if not applicable.

  When adding screenshots and screen recordings, keep an eye on privacy and copyright!
  Do not add them, if clear names or other sensible information can be seen.
  Do not add them, if content can be seen that you do not have the copyright of.
-->

## Checklist

<!--
  Go through all items and check them off before requesting a review.
  If an item is not applicable to your change, you can mark it with [N/A].
-->

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I have run `yarn run prettier:write` and `yarn run lint:fix` and resolved all issues
- [ ] I have tested my changes manually in at least one browser
- [ ] I have added or updated relevant documentation / JSDoc comments (if applicable)
- [ ] I have run the automated tests for the codebase and the built userscript

## Additional Notes

<!--
  Is there anything else reviewers should know?
  Open questions, known limitations, follow-up tasks, or alternative approaches you considered?
  Remove this section if not applicable.
-->
